raw_text: maría valverde almazán address: rafael de riego 11, 6d 28045 madrid, spain tel: +34 637 136 221 e-mail: maria.valverde.almazan@gmail.com date and place of birth: 28/04/1991 ciudad real, spain nationality: spanish professional experience mission test engineer february 2017 present. mission support systems, airbus, getafe, spain. on behalf of abbatia tecnologia s.l. mission test engineer for the airbus a330 mrtt (on board and on ground) focused on detailed design considering a v-shape development framework. main functions: - identify software quality issues to provide stakeholders with information about the quality of the software product, providing the capabilities required to satisfy the users operational needs. - design and execution of test plans adhered to the software requirements. - validation & verification activities as rig testing, a/c ground testing, etc. - support the full qualification & certification processes of the product. - prepare project status reports and update the project plan to include agreed changes. surveyor april june 2016. internship at universidad politécnica de madrid, madrid, spain. research in hazard and seismic risk at villavicencio (colombia). qa & testing engineer january july 2017. internship at efron consulting, madrid, spain. infinity-b2b project (telefonica global solutions - global it). education september 2016 february 2017. erasmus exchange program. czech technical university, prague, czech republic. september 2015 present. master degree in geodesic and cartographic engineering. universidad politécnica de madrid, madrid, spain. september 2010 july 2015. bachelor degree in geomatic and surveying engineering. universidad politécnica de madrid, madrid, spain. additional courses october 2014 (48h). introduction to the geographic information systems (gis). march 2014 (30h). satellite geodesy, 3d laser scanning, uav seminars. june 2013 (24h). emotional intelligence in professional environments. language skills - spanish: mother tongue. - english: b2 level. internal accreditation of universidad politécnica de madrid, 2014. - french: basic level. computer skills - microsoft word, excel, power point, access and outlook: proficient user. - information processing arcgis, geomedia and microstation: proficient user. - ibm rational doors: proficient user. - hp quality center and application lifecycle management (alm): intermediate user. - visual basic, javascript, android and matlab programming: basic user. other information - experience working in new and multicultural environments. - communication and organizational skills. - willingness to travel or to work abroad. - driving license b. - hobbies: sport (skiing, cycling), reading and traveling.
